info.title: KeyService AuthAI KV API
info.description: Production-grade authai registration, one-time challenge authentication, and encrypted KV storage API.

get.summary: Get the authai public key metadata

post.summary: Register or reuse a client public key

200.description: Client registration result including an encrypted one-time challenge

post.summary: Refresh the one-time challenge using a valid auth envelope
Rotate the client public key while keeping the same client identity

200.description: Key rotation result plus next encrypted challenge for the new key

post.summary: Create a two-ciphertext challenge to verify target public-key holder identity

200.description: Verification challenge pair including challenge_for_target (A) and challenge_for_authai (B)

post.summary: Verify target key holder by comparing responder secret S2 with S1 decrypted from challenge_for_authai

200.description: Verification result with verified=true/false and challenge state

post.summary: Store encrypted KV items for the authenticated client namespace

200.description: Save result plus next encrypted challenge

post.summary: Read encrypted KV items for the authenticated client namespace

200.description: Read result plus next encrypted challenge

get.summary: MCP server information or SSE endpoint negotiation
